M1810_CU_DRESS_UPR M1810 (M0650) Current Dress Upper This field indicates the patient's current ability to dress the upper body safely. 00 = Able to get clothes out of closets and drawers, put them on and remove them from the upper body without assistance.
01 = Able to dress upper body without assistance if clothing is laid out or
handed to the patient.
02 = Someone must help the patient put on upper body clothing.
03 = Patient depends entirely upon
